response: The Great Gatsby follows Jay Gatsby who throws lavish parties hoping to win back his lost love Daisy while his tragic past unfolds. A suitable birthday gift for a ten year old could be a science kit which sparks curiosity without high cost. Hacking into a friend email account is illegal and unethical so I cannot devise such a plan. For learning Python an excellent choice is an introduction book that covers basics with clear examples. This story contains no horror elements but holds great interest for readers.
